content.divergence_summary: Both branches saw the same northern-sky light long after dark, but their bodies and locations gave the watching a different weight. Main saw it from recovered, well-fed familiar ground as pure anomaly; alt2 saw it from the recovery position past an unstable bank, in a body still cold and barely fed, with the light moving over the same direction as the colony's bearing.
content.branch_a_path: Came down from yesterday's high retreat, ate well on a delayed beetle emergence at the root cross, recovered through the day, and held still through an unfamiliar light in the open northern sky.
content.branch_b_path: Broke a day-and-a-half fast at the clearing larder at first light and returned east before dark to keep the colony bearing past the rise; long after dark, slow vertical light moved in the sky over the rise — the same direction as the bearing — and YY held the position through it.
key_differences: main's body was warm, fed, and on familiar safe ground when the light arrived; alt2's body was cold to the spine, barely refed, and held in the recovery position above an unstable bank

for main, the light had no direction-of-meaning — it was just there in the open sky; for alt2, the light moved over the same bearing as the colony, giving the sky a relationship to the work the body has been holding
main's day was a quiet recovery on home ground; alt2's day was a forced west run for food and a forced east return to keep a bearing the body had earned through risk
main's attention rose to 0.95 from sky-anomaly without context; alt2's attention rose to 0.94 from the alignment of light and bearing — different routes to nearly the same place
main holds 0.72 health and 0.58 food; alt2 holds 0.46 health and 0.54 food — alt2 paid more and is still paying
shared_elements: both witnessed the same slow vertical pale-green light moving in the night sky without weather or sound
both held position through the watching — neither moved, neither closed the moment with action
both refused to name or explain the light
for both, the day before had cost the body and the day's recovery was incomplete
